name: Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 cups of all-purpose flour with 1/4 cup of sugar.
2. Add butter and blend until the mixture is finely mixed.
3. Press into a jelly roll pan and bake for 15 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. In a separate bowl, beat together eggs, brown sugar, 1/4 cup of all-purpose flour, and baking powder.
5. Stir in coconut and nuts. Spread the filling over the crust.
6. Return the pan to the oven and bake for an additional 25 minutes.
7. Blend lemon juice, zest, and powdered sugar until smooth.
8. Spread the mixture on top of the hot cookies.
9. Allow to cool before cutting into bars.
